title: geum calthifolium
intro: Geum calthifolium, also known as the Wood Avens or Herb Bennet, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Geum calthifolium include its ability to stimulate the immune system, reduce fever, and soothe digestive problems, such as diarrhea and ulcers. Geum calthifolium can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
